title: TACZ-Sound Attracts Zombies
description: Tacz gunfire now triggers Zombie Awareness feral sense
body:
Tacz: Sound Attracts Zombies is a lightweight addon that bridges the gap between the realistic firearms of the Tacz (Timeless and Classics Guns) mod and the enhanced zombie AI of Zombie Awareness. This mod creates tension and risk-reward gameplay by making every shot matter—because in a world overrun by the undead, noise is a death sentence.

How It Works:
When you fire any gun from the Tacz mod, the sound generates an in-game event that triggers Zombie Awareness's "Feral Sense" system. Nearby zombies will instantly detect the gunshot and investigate the source, regardless of line of sight. The louder the gunshot, the more attention it draws.

Simple. Seamless. No Configuration Needed.

Zero configuration required—works out of the box

Automatically uses Zombie Awareness's default detection range settings

Compatible with all Tacz firearms (pistols, rifles, shotguns, explosives)

No performance impact—lightweight code execution

Client-side and server-side compatible

Why Download?
Tired of firing powerful guns with no consequences? Want to add genuine survival horror tension to your gunplay? This mod ensures that every bullet fired is a tactical decision. Use silencers wisely, or prepare to face the horde you just invited to dinner.

Compatibility:

Requires: Tacz mod and Zombie Awareness mod

Works on Minecraft Forge (version specified by your modpack)

Perfect for zombie apocalypse modpacks, survival horror experiences, or any pack wanting smarter zombie reactions

Download now and remember: Shots fired. Horde summoned.
